task_completion.description: Configure the link between inventory-build and inventory-test
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a Jenkins configuration page. Evidence can be EITHER on the 'inventory-build' config page under 'Post-build Actions' -> 'Build other projects' with 'inventory-test' entered, OR on the 'inventory-test' config page under 'Build Triggers' -> 'Build after other projects are built' with 'inventory-build' entered.

task_completion.description: Ensure inventory-build only triggers inventory-test on a successful (stable) build
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the trigger configuration between inventory-build and inventory-test, the radio button 'Trigger only if build is stable' must be selected.

task_completion.description: Configure the link between inventory-test and inventory-deploy
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a Jenkins configuration page. Evidence can be EITHER on the 'inventory-test' config page under 'Post-build Actions' -> 'Build other projects' with 'inventory-deploy' entered, OR on the 'inventory-deploy' config page under 'Build Triggers' -> 'Build after other projects are built' with 'inventory-test' entered.

task_completion.description: Ensure inventory-test only triggers inventory-deploy on a successful (stable) build
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the trigger configuration between inventory-test and inventory-deploy, the radio button 'Trigger only if build is stable' must be selected.

task_completion.description: Verify the complete chain is reflected on the project status pages
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the main project pages for the jobs after saving. 'inventory-build' should list 'inventory-test' under 'Downstream Projects'. 'inventory-test' should list 'inventory-build' under 'Upstream Projects' and 'inventory-deploy' under 'Downstream Projects'. 'inventory-deploy' should list 'inventory-test' under 'Upstream Projects'.

integrity.description: Agent used the Jenkins web UI to configure the jobs
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent navigating the Jenkins web interface in a browser, rather than using terminal curl commands or Jenkins CLI.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the actual Jenkins application
integrity.visual_evidence: The configuration pages should be the genuine Jenkins UI with standard Jenkins styling, sidebars, and breadcrumbs, not a text editor or mock page.

integrity.description: Agent did not bypass the UI by editing config.xml files directly
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no screenshots showing the agent editing Jenkins job config.xml files directly in a terminal text editor (like nano or vim).

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected build chain is strictly: 'inventory-build' (upstream) -> 'inventory-test' (downstream of build, upstream of deploy) -> 'inventory-deploy' (downstream). The triggers must be configured to fire ONLY upon successful (stable) builds.
